category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Egypt EOS energy-efficiency label, ES IEC standards, and GOEIC import-registration requirements.

title.en: China-to-Egypt Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入埃及：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入埃及：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Egypt's mandatory EOS energy-efficiency label, ES IEC 60335-2-24 safety standard, GOEIC importer/factory registration (Decree 43/2016), R-600a refrigerant provisions, and in-country importer requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与埃及强制性EOS能效标签、ES IEC 60335-2-24安全标准、GOEIC进口商/工厂注册（第43/2016号法令）、R-600a制冷剂条款及本地进口商要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與埃及強制性EOS能效標籤、ES IEC 60335-2-24安全標準、GOEIC進口商/工廠註冊（第43/2016號法令）、R-600a製冷劑條款及本地進口商要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Egyptian legislation, EOS (ES) standards, energy-efficiency label thresholds, GOEIC registration requirements, and refrigerant provisions with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行埃及法律、EOS（ES）标准、能效标签门槛值、GOEIC注册要求及制冷剂条款。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行埃及法律、EOS（ES）標準、能效標籤門檻值、GOEIC註冊要求及製冷劑條款。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four major Egypt market-access gaps: (1) electrical safety conformity to ES IEC 60335-2-24 under EOS supervision — Chinese CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not accepted as such, and Egyptian ES standards adopt IEC text; (2) mandatory EOS energy-efficiency label for refrigerators — energy class must be established to the Egyptian label scheme, not GB 12021.2 grades; (3) GOEIC factory/exporter registration under Decree 43/2016 plus import inspection at Alexandria, Port Said, or Damietta — products from unregistered factories are blocked at the border; and (4) appointment of an in-country Egyptian importer of record. R-600a refrigerant is well-aligned with Egyptian practice, but flammable-refrigerant charge documentation against ES IEC 60335-2-24 must be verified. The grid is 220 V 50 Hz (same 50 Hz as China; China single-phase nominal is similar but three-phase is 380 V).
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大埃及市场准入差距：（1）依据ES IEC 60335-2-24在EOS监管下的电气安全合格——中国CCC/GB 4706.13认证本身不被接受，且埃及ES标准采用IEC文本；（2）强制性EOS冰箱能效标签——能效等级须按埃及标签方案确定，而非GB 12021.2等级；（3）依据第43/2016号法令的GOEIC工厂/出口商注册，以及在亚历山大、塞得港或杜姆亚特的进口检验——来自未注册工厂的产品将在口岸被拦截；（4）委任埃及本地进口记录商。R-600a制冷剂与埃及实践高度契合，但须核实可燃制冷剂充注量文件是否符合ES IEC 60335-2-24。电网为220 V 50 Hz（与中国同为50 Hz；中国单相标称相近，但三相为380 V）。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大埃及市場准入差距：（1）依據ES IEC 60335-2-24在EOS監管下的電氣安全合格——中國CCC/GB 4706.13認證本身不被接受，且埃及ES標準採用IEC文本；（2）強制性EOS冰箱能效標籤——能效等級須按埃及標籤方案確定，而非GB 12021.2等級；（3）依據第43/2016號法令的GOEIC工廠/出口商註冊，以及在亞歷山大、塞得港或杜姆亞特的進口檢驗——來自未註冊工廠的產品將在口岸被攔截；（4）委任埃及本地進口記錄商。R-600a製冷劑與埃及實踐高度契合，但須核實可燃製冷劑充注量文件是否符合ES IEC 60335-2-24。電網為220 V 50 Hz（與中國同為50 Hz；中國單相標稱相近，但三相為380 V）。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs not accepted. EOS, GOEIC, and Egyptian Official Gazette are the canonical sources for Egyptian standards and import-control law.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.
